pages.text: A few islands hide behind something rare — a far-off biome, a lucky drop, a 1-in-20 find. Their pages stay a locked $(bold)?$() until you have what they need, so here's exactly where to look. A green $(2)[x]$() turns up under each once you've gathered the makings.

$(bold)Woodland Mansion$()$(br)Win a $(item)Totem of Undying$() from an $(item)evoker$(). One haunts the rare $(o)Evoker Cell$() — keep throwing $(item)Forest$() seeds into a $(bold)dark forest$() until one rolls the cell (about 1 in 20), then kill the evoker inside.

$(bold)Ocean Monument$()$(br)Take $(item)wet sponge$() off the bed of a $(item)Large Aquatic$() isle thrown over a $(bold)deep ocean$(), and smelt it dry. (Rarely a whole monument rises there, sponge rooms and all.)
$(bold)Aquarium$()$(br)Raise $(item)turtles$() on a warm $(bold)beach$() for a $(item)scute$(), or mine an $(item)Ocean Monument$() for $(item)prismarine$() — its guardians drop the shards.
$(bold)Trial Chamber$()$(br)Throw a $(item)Rocky$() or $(item)Ancient$() isle $(bold)deep$(), near the world's floor — that's where the $(item)diamond$(), copper and tuff it wants come up.
$(bold)Badlands$()$(br)Throw a $(item)Desert$() seed over a $(bold)badlands$() biome — its sand comes up $(item)red$(). Bake your clay into terracotta for the rest.
$(bold)Jungle Temple$()$(br)Throw a $(item)Forest$() seed into a $(bold)jungle$() for jungle wood; moss comes off an $(item)Ancient$() isle, and a tripwire hook from iron and a stick.
